Article also gives a rial figure of '30.2 million rials' alongside this USD figure, which is almost certainly a typesetting/unit error in the original print article (should likely read billion, not million, rials, given ~30bn/$425m implies ~71 rials/USD, a plausible 1980 official rate) -- transcribed as printed, not corrected.
